title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co Consulting Pvt Ltd!
